read_file_contents: read the contents of a file with line numbers and optional offset and limit parameters
read_file_with_offset: read a file starting from a specific line number using the offset parameter
read_file_with_limit: read a limited number of lines from a file using the limit parameter
check_file_read_permission: check if reading a file outside the project directory requires permission
resolve_file_path: resolve a relative or absolute file path against the tool context working directory
